requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter Electrical Safety: IEC 62109 Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器电气安全：IEC 62109证据
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器電氣安全：IEC 62109證據

summary.en: Tunisia projects and tenders commonly need inverter safety evidence aligned with international PV inverter standards. IEC 62109-1 covers general safety requirements for PV power conversion equipment, and IEC 62109-2 covers particular requirements for inverters. Whether the evidence is legally mandatory depends on the import route, INNORPI-adopted NT standard scope, tender documents, utility review, financing conditions, and project owner requirements.
summary.zh: 突尼斯项目和招标通常需要与国际光伏逆变器标准一致的逆变器安全证据。IEC 62109-1涵盖光伏电力转换设备的一般安全要求，IEC 62109-2涵盖逆变器的特殊要求。该证据是否属于法定强制要求，取决于进口路径、INNORPI采纳的NT标准适用范围、招标文件、公用事业审查、融资条件和项目业主要求。
summary.zht: 突尼西亞項目和招標通常需要與國際光伏逆變器標準一致的逆變器安全證據。IEC 62109-1涵蓋光伏電力轉換設備的一般安全要求，IEC 62109-2涵蓋逆變器的特殊要求。該證據是否屬於法定強制要求，取決於進口路徑、INNORPI採納的NT標準適用範圍、招標文件、公用事業審查、融資條件和項目業主要求。

standards_or_laws: Applicable INNORPI-adopted NT standards where specified by project or authority

summary.en: China suppliers may hold IEC 62109 CB reports, GB/T inverter reports, or manufacturer declarations. These can support the Tunisia file, but Chinese domestic reports should be cross-mapped to the exact IEC or NT clauses requested by the buyer, utility, or tender.
summary.zh: 中国供应商可能持有IEC 62109 CB报告、GB/T逆变器报告或制造商声明。这些材料可支持突尼斯资料包，但中国国内报告应逐条映射到买方、公用事业单位或招标文件要求的具体IEC或NT条款。
summary.zht: 中國供應商可能持有IEC 62109 CB報告、GB/T逆變器報告或製造商聲明。這些材料可支持突尼西亞資料包，但中國國內報告應逐條映射到買方、公用事業單位或招標文件要求的具體IEC或NT條款。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109 CB Scheme test report where available

gap.en: Do not assume a China GB/T test report is accepted as-is. Prepare IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 certificates or test reports, model-family coverage, critical component lists, installation manual, nameplate ratings, and a clause mapping for any China-only evidence.
gap.zh: 不要假设中国GB/T测试报告可原样被接受。应准备IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2证书或测试报告、型号系列覆盖说明、关键元器件清单、安装手册、铭牌额定值，以及中国专用证据的条款映射表。
gap.zht: 不要假設中國GB/T測試報告可原樣被接受。應準備IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2證書或測試報告、型號系列覆蓋說明、關鍵元器件清單、安裝手冊、銘牌額定值，以及中國專用證據的條款映射表。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary as a standalone international standard unless made mandatory by Tunisian regulation, INNORPI-adopted NT scope, import control, utility procedure, tender, financing, insurer, or project-owner documents
mandatory_status.cn: Commonly voluntary or project-required for export files unless a Chinese regulation, certification scheme, tender, or buyer specification makes it mandatory

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62109 evidence is the safest baseline for Tunisia-facing inverter files, but it should be tied to the specific Tunisian project, tender, INNORPI / NT reference, and STEG / ANME review route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62109证据是面向突尼斯逆变器资料包的稳妥基线，但应绑定具体突尼斯项目、招标文件、INNORPI / NT引用以及STEG / ANME审查路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62109證據是面向突尼西亞逆變器資料包的穩妥基線，但應綁定具體突尼西亞項目、招標文件、INNORPI / NT引用以及STEG / ANME審查路徑。
